typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		VIIDWFGUID___Path as string,
		JAVA_PATH_ID as string,
		Adj_Consequence_Model_Escalation_Date as string,
		VIIDWFGUID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> CMAdjust
CMAdjust derive(Import_date = currentDate(),
		VIIDWFGUID___Path = replace(VIIDWFGUID___Path, toString(' '), toString(''))) ~> CleanblanksVIIGUIDPATH
CleanblanksVIIGUIDPATH sink(input(
		VIIDWFGUID___Path as string,
		Java_Path as string,
		Adj_Consequence_Model_Escalation_Date as string,
		VIIDWFGUID as string,
		Import_date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		VIIDWFGUID___Path,
		Java_Path = JAVA_PATH_ID,
		Adj_Consequence_Model_Escalation_Date,
		VIIDWFGUID,
		Import_date)) ~> OLEDBDestination
